title: Equipment
description: Mundane equipment: weapons, armor, shields, adventuring gear, ammunition, spellcasting focuses, and equipment packs. Kind-specific stat blocks nest under a per-kind key. Mirrors the SRD 5.2.1 Equipment tables (docs/srd/srd-coverage-audit.md §4). The eq_* content library is WS-A2.

id.description: Stable id; eq_ prefix + lowercase snake_case (e.g. eq_longsword, eq_chain_mail).

kind.description: Top-level discriminator. The matching per-kind block (weapon/armor/shield/...) carries the stat-specific fields.

cost.description: Purchase price. `quantity` in the given coin `unit`.

weight_lb.description: Weight in pounds (number; fractional allowed, e.g. 0.25 for a Dart).

weapon.description: Required-in-practice when kind=weapon. SRD weapon stat line.

dice.description: e.g. '1d8'; '' or absent for fixed-only damage.

modifier.description: Flat damage modifier baked into the weapon (rare; ability mod is applied by the engine).

versatile_damage.description: Two-handed damage dice for Versatile weapons (e.g. '1d10' for a Longsword).

mastery.description: The weapon's mastery property (2024). Usable only by a creature with a feature that unlocks mastery.

range.description: Normal / long range in feet (for Ranged or Thrown weapons).

ammunition_type.description: For Ammunition-property weapons: which ammo it fires (e.g. 'arrow', 'bolt', 'bullet', 'needle').

armor.description: Required-in-practice when kind=armor. SRD armor stat line.

base_ac.description: Base AC before Dexterity (e.g. 14 for Scale Mail, 16 for Chain Mail).

add_dex_modifier.description: Whether the Dexterity modifier is added (Light/Medium = true, Heavy = false).

max_dex_bonus.description: Cap on the Dexterity modifier added (Medium = 2). null/absent = uncapped (Light) or N/A (Heavy).

strength_requirement.description: Min Strength score or the wearer's Speed drops 10 ft (e.g. 13 for Chain Mail). 0/absent = none.

item.description: eq_* id or plain item name for unmodeled gear.

activation.description: For consumable / usable gear that takes an action (e.g. throwing a vial of Acid, drinking Antitoxin, spreading Caltrops). Reuses the shared activation shape.

consumable.description: True for single-use gear (Acid, Alchemist's Fire, Holy Water, Healer's Kit charges, Spell Scroll).

effect_primitives.description: Mechanical hook for combat-relevant gear (e.g. Acid/Alchemist's Fire thrown-attack damage, Ball Bearings/Caltrops save-or-condition, Healer's Kit heal). Same primitive vocabulary as features. Most gear omits this.

aliases.description: Alternate internal names for content resolution (WS-I import matching).

public_name.description: PI-safe public display name override (WS-I rename layer, plan §3.8).

stage4_stub.description: Namespaced Stage-4 extension blob (plan §3.10): item flavor-facts, crafting links, non-combat utility. No engine semantics; speculative data only.
